pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17 APIs, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 language features and potentially causing compatibility issues with JDK 21-specific runtime behaviors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet-api dependency with jakarta.servlet-api to support Jakarta EE 10.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.servlet package was removed in Jakarta EE 10; code importing javax.servlet will fail to compile or run on a Jakarta EE 10 compliant container (like Tomcat 10.1) without this dependency change.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet:jstl dependency with jakarta.servlet.jsp.jstl-api to support Jakarta EE 10.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.servlet.jsp.jstl package was removed in Jakarta EE 10; code importing javax.servlet.jsp.jstl will fail to compile or run without this dependency change.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace taglibs-standard-impl dependency with jakarta.servlet.jsp.jstl implementation to support Jakarta EE 10.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old implementation relies on javax packages which are incompatible with Jakarta EE 10 containers; runtime JSTL tags will fail to resolve without the Jakarta-compatible implementation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove javax.annotation-api dependency as it is no longer required or compatible with the new Jakarta setup.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is deprecated/removed in newer Jakarta EE versions; keeping this dependency may cause classpath conflicts or unused dependency warnings, though strictly speaking, removal is often polishment unless it causes a specific conflict. However, in the context of a full Jakarta migration, removing javax artifacts is part of the breaking migration to avoid mixed-namespace issues.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove gson dependency which is no longer used in the project.
Update log4j-core dependency version from 2.19.0 to 2.22.1.

 */
